title: Jesuh in Nangma Dahna A Thei Hi

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Dahna a om khempeuh, Topa Jesuh’n thei;
Lungsim kisikna le thungetna zong thei;
keei lo-n um in, na lungkhauhsak in;
Na van Topa suan in, hong nuamsak ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: lungsim sungah, Nang pha hong sa hi;
Na galte khut sung pan, Nang hong gum ding hi;
bangin, lam hong hilh ding hi;
A vaang tanna lamah na tung thei ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Jesuh’n thei, Na thuumna za hi;
Na lunggim lam zong thei, na kiko za hi;
Lungsim nuam hong pia ding na khitui nul ding.
